canonical_definition: Code-Switching Red-Teaming, a framework that synthesizes multilingual code-switching adversarial prompts to evaluate both safety and multilingual understanding of LLMs.
papers: CoE: A Clue of Emotion Framework for Emotion Recognition in Conversations
